system.subtitle: 企业商业版图与供应链递归探索系统

semantic_revision.source_use_limit: Discovery/context evidence only; not eligible for relationship_fact_candidates or graph-edge publication without separate passage-level support.

implemented_scope: NVDA-ANCHOR-001 is retained as an official-source discovery anchor for ecosystem breadth.
The anchor no longer forces the precise packaging/test token contract because that term is not required for its context-only scope.
The ingestion paths persist anchor_scope metadata in raw payloads and evidence-chain structured facts.
No relationship_fact_candidates, published relationships, source-license clearance or release clearance are created by this revision.
remaining_gaps_before_a202_done: Production owner sign-off for real relationship publication is still required.
Formal source-license/legal/release clearance is still required.
Selected live evidence remains context-only and cannot publish graph edges until reviewed.
A206/A209 long-duration retry, dead-letter and 24h soak evidence remain separate gates.
rollback: Restore the prior NVDA-ANCHOR-001 expected_entities_or_stages value.
Remove anchor_scope persistence fields from the ingestion loaders.
Restore the previous candidate-count assertions and regenerate dependent artifacts.
